topic: shopping malls markets to stay open until 9pm
headline_marked: Bangladesh relaxes power-saving rules: [[Markets and malls to stay open until 9 PM]]
headline: Bangladesh relaxes power-saving rules: Markets and malls to stay open until 9 PM
summary: New government directive allows shopping malls, markets, and retail shops to operate until 9 PM, extending previous restrictions aimed at conserving electricity.
details: The government has eased its power-saving measures, permitting shopping malls, markets, and retail shops nationwide to remain open until 9:00 PM starting tomorrow. This decision reverses an earlier order that mandated closure by 7:00 PM.

A notification issued by the Power Division today specifies that these establishments will now operate from 11:00 AM to 9:00 PM. The previous restriction, implemented on June 1, aimed to manage electricity consumption during peak hours.

Shop owners have expressed gratitude for the revised timings. Md Helal Uddin, president of the Bangladesh Dokan Malik Samity, thanked the prime minister and ministers for considering their request, which will allow for longer business hours and potentially increased sales.
caption:
Good news for shoppers and businesses! Bangladesh has extended operating hours for markets and malls, allowing them to stay open until 9 PM.

The government has eased its power-saving measures, permitting shopping malls, markets, and retail shops nationwide to remain open until 9:00 PM starting tomorrow. This decision reverses an earlier order that mandated closure by 7:00 PM.

A notification issued by the Power Division today specifies that these establishments will now operate from 11:00 AM to 9:00 PM. The previous restriction, implemented on June 1, aimed to manage electricity consumption during peak hours.

Shop owners have expressed gratitude for the revised timings. Md Helal Uddin, president of the Bangladesh Dokan Malik Samity, thanked the prime minister and ministers for considering their request, which will allow for longer business hours and potentially increased sales.

#Bangladesh #Markets #Shopping #Business #PowerSaving #Dhaka

Source: Dhaka Tribune, The Daily Star, Jamuna TV, Prothom Alo, Somoy News
tweet: Bangladesh relaxes power-saving rules: Markets and malls can now stay open until 9 PM, a change from the earlier 7 PM closing time. This move is expected to boost business. #Bangladesh #Markets
source: Dhaka Tribune, The Daily Star, Jamuna TV, Prothom Alo, Somoy News
